content:
# Voidage Replacement Ratio

**Summary**: The ratio of injected fluid volume to produced fluid volume.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-al-ismael|AL-ISMAEL, 2014]] compared regional pressure as a more robust metric than VRR for environmental safety.

## Scientific Context

- [[2014-al-ismael|AL-ISMAEL, 2014]] VRR is commonly used but can fail to detect localized pressure imbalances in large fields.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- reservoir-simulation

## Key Findings Across Sources

- VRR can be misleading because it does not account for the spatial distribution of pressure. ([[2014-al-ismael|AL-ISMAEL, 2014, p. 32]])
